scripts.package:release: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$version=(Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json).version; $outDir='releases'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null; $zip=Join-Path $outDir ('promptshield-extension-' + $version + '.zip'); if (Test-Path $zip) { Remove-Item $zip -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path 'dist\*' -DestinationPath $zip; Write-Output $zip"
